actors.name: Viable Cities
actors.description: Swedish strategic innovation programme for climate-neutral cities by 2030. Collaborates with Dark Matter Labs on System Demonstrators in Lund and Stockholm.
actors.connection: Dark Matter Labs partner, Swedish government initiative

intel.value: Climate-neutral cities by 2030 - whole-system approaches across governance, finance, data

actors.notes: FLAG: Nordic Connection / Sweden. Government innovation programme relevant as institutional partner.

projects.name: 10 New Insights in Climate Science
projects.description: Annual publication led by Future Earth Sweden Hub synthesising the most critical new findings in climate science. Led by Erik Pihl at Royal Swedish Academy of Sciences.

projects.name: Exponential Roadmap
projects.description: Reports translating complex climate data into actionable insights for halving global emissions every decade.

projects.name: DestinE Climate Change Adaptation Digital Twin
projects.description: Multidecadal climate simulation digital twin built by ECMWF as part of EU Destination Earth initiative. Allows interactive testing of adaptation strategies.

projects.name: DestinE Weather-Induced Extremes Digital Twin
projects.description: High-resolution weather forecasting digital twin for floods and droughts, built by ECMWF.

people.job_title: Head of the Destination Earth Sector, DG CNECT (European Commission)
people.skills: EU digital policy, digital twins, climate tech governance

people.job_title: Applications and Innovation Partnerships Lead, ECMWF
people.skills: Climate modelling, digital twins, innovation partnerships
